headline: Trump seeks way out of Iran war but struggles to define it
description: Speaking from Florida on Monday, the US president highlighted Washington's military successes but failed to offer a clear path out of the conflict, fueling the impression of ongoing improvisation.

headline: 'This is not our war': Lebanese voice anger against Hezbollah
description: Displaced by Israeli bombings in southern Lebanon and Beirut's southern suburbs, tens of thousands of Lebanese people, mainly Shiites, have sought refuge in Christian neighborhoods, fueling fears of further strikes there.

headline: Yann Le Cun raises €900 million for his France-based AI start-up
description: Valued at €3 billion, AMI, the new company founded by the former head of artificial intelligence at Meta, aims to create a 'new branch' of AI focused on the real world.

headline: Marine Gora rules over Coyote, a queer saloon in Paris
description: The 34-year-old entrepreneur created Coyote, a Western-themed venue designed to welcome the LGBTQIA+ community. The venue, which opened last fall in Paris's 3rd arrondissement, is halfway between a coffee shop and a wine bar, and offers inventive Tex-Mex cuisine with Vietnamese influences.

headline: 2026 French municipal elections: Has environmentalism become less divisive at the local level?
description: While environmental ambitions have waned nationally in France, emblematic measures such as greening public spaces or insulating buildings have become more widely accepted at the municipal level. However, some issues remain contentious.

One week before France's local elections, electorate leans right, poll shows
description: With environmental issues taking a back seat, security issues coming to the fore and a clear increase in support for the far-right Rassemblement National, the survey conducted by Ipsos BVA for Le Monde, Cevipof and the Jean Jaurès Foundation paints an unprecedented picture of the French political landscape.

headline: Paris mayoral elections: What do the candidates propose?
description: Le Monde breaks down the platforms of the capital's six main candidates on safety, cleanliness, housing and the environment ahead of the French municipal elections on March 15 and 22.

headline: Thomas Piketty: 'In the face of Trump's militaristic drift and looming disaster, Europe must equip itself to have global influence'
description: Following the intervention in Venezuela, the war against Iran launched by the US president signals yet another admission of weakness by the United States, observes the economist in his column. This military agitation primarily serves to bolster the US economy.
